title: Support - App, user is logged out, correct data
scenario: Support > App card in App Settings shows tenant name, tenant ID, and user ID as None after logging out, while App ID remains unchanged and last connection shows as unknown
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the Account icon or menu to access Account settings.
4. Log into a valid tenant (enter tenant credentials and complete authentication).
5. Go to App Settings (e.g., via menu or gear icon).
6. Tap on the Support > App card.
7. Observe and record the displayed data: tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, App ID, and last connection.
8. Return to Account settings and log out of the tenant.
9. Navigate back to App Settings > Support > App card.
10. Observe and record the displayed data again: tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, App ID, and last connection.
expected: When logged into a tenant, the Support > App card displays the correct tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, App ID, and last connection. After logging out, the tenant name, tenant ID, and user ID show as None, the App ID remains unchanged (same as when logged in), and the last connection shows as 'unknown'.
